MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS SHIENG CHEUNG LAU, ANNA LAI LAU, AND EVAN LAU'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER.
APPEARANCE: Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq. of Bornstein & Bornstein 409-7611 for pltfs & opposing parties; Drexel A. Bradshaw, Esq. of Bradshaw & Associates, P.C. 433-4800 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - sustained with 10 days leave to amend to allege proper ending date in complaint for the thirty day notice. New notice does not need to be served. Deft to submit proposed order. (301/EHG/DM) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489
